privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic 3D model of a trailer coupler beam from scratch. The agent must create a U-channel profile sketch with specific constraints: 180mm overall width, 120mm web height, 20mm flange width, 12mm wall thickness, and 140mm inner width, all verified by the verifier logic. The sketch must be extruded to a depth of 800mm (requiring an extrusion group), and the final outputs must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/coupler_beam.slvs and /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/coupler_beam.dxf.
